description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Flatpak that runs on pull requests and pushes to the master branch or tags matching v*. Use a matrix strategy to build Flatpak packages for x86_64 and aarch64 architectures on an ubuntu-latest environment. Checkout the repository, install dependencies if necessary, set up QEMU for non-x86_64 architectures, build Flatpak packages, and upload release assets to GitHub.
